replies.reference: Thanks Kate, We were looking for somebody like you. You can run it with any settings, as you run it every day. Make sure you see version 3.0.0.30. I think however it is better if you can run the report against production data because the test data are not good enough. I think David Poston created a shortcut on Cara's and Valarie's computers, you can talk to him to do it for you as well. The command from the command prompt should be: C:\Enpower\stage FwdObl user_id user_password pwrprodn_ded (ask the IT people if this does not mean anything to you, I can phone David as well you want me to) Thanks, Kroum 713-853-9980
